case_title: AETNA FINANCE DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS ALVAREZ DELMY R

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE DBA ITT FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ DELMY R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALVAREZ DELMY R
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-04-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
NOT. OF CONT. TO DELMY ALVAREZ RETURNED, DOESN'T LIVE HERE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE DBA ITT FINANCIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVAREZ DELMY R $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DELMY ALVAREZ RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
